name: Astrolabe
text: Now and at the start of your next turn: (1) +1 Buy

name: Bazaar
text: +1 Card +2 Actions +(1)

name: Blockade
text: Gain a card costing up to (4), setting it aside. At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand. While its set aside, when another player gains a copy of it on their turn, they gain a Curse.

name: Caravan
text: +1 Card +1 Action At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Corsair
text: +(2) At the start of your next turn, +1 Card. Until then, each other player trashes the first Silver or Gold they play each turn.

name: Cutpurse
text: +(2) Each other player discards a Copper (or reveals a hand with no Copper).

name: Fishing Village
text: +2 Actions +(1) At the start of your next turn: +1 Action and +(1).

name: Haven
text: +1 Card +1 Action Set aside a card from your hand face down (under this). At the start of your next turn, put it into your hand.

name: Island
text: Put this and a card from your hand onto your Island mat. | {2}

name: Lighthouse
text: +1 Action +(1) At the start of your next turn, +(1). Until then, when another player plays an Attack card, it doesnt affect you.

name: Lookout
text: +1 Action Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Trash one of them. Discard one of them. Put the other one back on top of your deck.

name: Merchant Ship
text: Now and at the start of your next turn: +(2).

name: Monkey
text: Until your next turn, when the player to your right gains a card, +1 Card. At the start of your next turn, +1 Card.

name: Native Village
text: +2 Actions Choose one: Put the top card of your deck face down on your Native Village mat (you may look at those cards at any time); or put all the cards from your mat into your hand.

name: Outpost
text: You only draw 3 cards for your next hand. Take an extra turn after this one (but not a turn in a row).

name: Pirate
text: At the start of your next turn, gain a Treasure costing up to (6) to your hand. | When any player gains a Treasure, you may play this from your hand.

name: Sailor
text: +1 Action Once this turn, when you gain a Duration card, you may play it. At the start of your next turn, +(2) and you may trash a card from your hand.

name: Salvager
text: +1 Buy Trash a card from your hand. +(1) per (1) it costs.

name: Sea Chart
text: +1 Card +1 Action Reveal the top card of your deck. If you have a copy of it in play, put it into your hand.

name: Sea Witch
text: +2 Cards Each other player gains a Curse. At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards, then discard 2 cards.

name: Smugglers
text: Gain a copy of a card costing up to (6) that the player to your right gained on their last turn.

name: Tactician
text: If you have at least one card in hand: Discard your hand, and at the start of your next turn, +5 Cards, +1 Action, and +1 Buy.

name: Tide Pools
text: +3 Cards +1 Action At the start of your next turn, discard 2 cards.

name: Treasure Map
text: Trash this and a Treasure Map from your hand. If you trashed two Treasure Maps, gain 4 Golds onto your deck.

name: Treasury
text: +1 Card +1 Action +(1) When you discard this from play, if you didnt gain any Victory cards in your Buy phase this turn, you may put this onto your deck.

name: Warehouse
text: +3 Cards +1 Action Discard 3 cards.

name: Wharf
text: Now and at the start of your next turn: +2 Cards and +1 Buy.

name: Ambassador
text: Reveal a card from your hand. Return up to 2 copies of it from your hand to the Supply. Then each other player gains a copy of it.

name: Embargo
text: +(2) Trash this to add an Embargo token to a Supply pile. (For the rest of the game, when a player buys a card from that pile, they gain a Curse.)

name: Explorer
text: You may reveal a Province from your hand. If you do, gain a Gold to your hand. If you dont, gain a Silver to your hand.

name: Ghost Ship
text: +2 Cards Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand puts cards from their hand onto their deck until they have 3 cards in hand.

name: Navigator
text: +(2) Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Either discard them all, or put them back in any order.

name: Pearl Diver
text: +1 Card +1 Action Look at the bottom card of your deck. You may put it on top.

name: Pirate Ship
text: Choose one: +(1) per Coin token on your Pirate Ship mat; or each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of those Treasures that you choose, and discards the rest, and then if anyone trashed a Treasure, you add a Coin token to your Pirate Ship mat.

name: Sea Hag
text: Each other player discards the top card of their deck, then gains a Curse onto their deck.
